name: Easter
traditions: Church services and sunrise worship; Easter egg hunts; decorating eggs; hot cross buns; Paschal lamb feasts; processions and passion plays.
historicalBackground: Easter celebrates the resurrection of Jesus Christ on the third day after crucifixion. The date follows the lunisolar calendar, tied to the Jewish Passover.
description: The most important Christian festival celebrating the resurrection of Jesus Christ, observed with religious services and springtime traditions.
